zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏多整理
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD维持窄幅震荡结构，价格在85.6至85.95间整理，整体重心略向上，运行于20日均线上方，短线偏多但动能有限。

MACD指标柱体维持正值，显示多头动能仍在延续，但信号线缺失导致确认不足，同时RSI未提供，需结合价格行为判断强弱结构偏中性偏多。

下方支撑位关注85.68与85.30一带，20日均线85.38形成动态支撑，上方阻力集中在85.95及86.50区域，突破后或打开上行空间。

短线建议以区间交易为主，未有效突破前高不追涨，回踩85.6附近可关注低吸机会，若跌破85.3则需警惕回调加深风险，控制仓位为宜。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana is maintaining a mildly bullish intraday structure, with price action holding above the 20-period moving average at 85.38 while trading near 85.89. The narrow range between 85.68 and 85.95 suggests consolidation after a recent upward push rather than aggressive selling pressure. Buyers continue to defend short-term pullbacks, indicating that momentum remains constructive as long as SOL/USD stays above the 85.30–85.40 support zone.

The MACD reading at 0.144 reflects positive momentum, even though the signal line is unavailable. This indicates that bullish pressure still has a slight edge, particularly with price remaining above the short-term moving average. RSI data is not currently available, limiting confirmation of overbought or oversold conditions, but the subdued 24-hour volatility and stable price behavior imply a balanced market rather than an overheated rally.

Immediate resistance is developing near 86.00, which has repeatedly capped upside attempts during the session. A confirmed break above that level could open the path toward 86.40 and potentially 87.00 if broader crypto sentiment strengthens. On the downside, initial support sits around 85.40, aligned with the SMA(20), while stronger structural support appears near 85.00. A move below that area would weaken the short-term bullish setup and could trigger a deeper retracement toward 84.50.

Short-term traders may consider buying controlled pullbacks near support while maintaining disciplined stop-loss placement below 85.00. Momentum-focused participants could also watch for a breakout above 86.00 accompanied by stronger volume confirmation before entering long positions. Conservative traders may prefer waiting for clearer directional confirmation, as the current tight consolidation range suggests the market is preparing for a larger move but has not yet fully committed to a breakout or reversal.
